title: feat: upgrade fireworks models (minimax 2.7, qwen vl)
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Upgraded optics
gist.blurb: We swapped out some engine parts. MiniMax is now on 2.7, and Qwen Vision got a massive context window upgrade. More tokens, less problems.
gist.summary: Upgraded the MiniMax model to version 2.7 and migrated Qwen Vision to a more efficient Fireworks model with double the context window.
gist.impact: You can now stuff up to 262K tokens into Qwen Vision, and MiniMax 2.7 is live—all without breaking your existing API calls.
gist.visual_concept: Fireworks provider and vision models. Depict the bee and monitor robot watching literal fireworks, with the robot displaying an eye/vision symbol.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot sitting on a grassy hill, looking up at beautiful soft pastel fireworks in the night sky. The robot's screen shows a glowing eye icon representing vision models. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
